headline: BlackRock Bitcoin News: IBIT Suffers $1.3Bn Outflow as Iran Shakes Safe Money

Liquidations slowed considerably from $1Bn late last week to $206M in the past 24-hours, with $150M of that figure coming from long positions. ETF flows closed last week bearishly, ...
